capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a SOC service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an enterprise SOC service exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise SOC service exists

questions.prompt: Is the SOC service reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the SOC service is reviewed on a regular cadence for efficacy
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular SOC service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document KPIs and KRIs for the SOC service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether SOC KPIs and KRIs are documented
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for SOC service

questions.prompt: Are SOC KPIs and KRIs reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether SOC KPIs and KRIs are reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular KPI/KRI review

questions.prompt: Do KPIs or KRIs track mean time to detect (MTTD) and mean time to respond (MTTR) for security incidents?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether MTTD and MTTR metrics are tracked
questions.evaluation_focus: Mean time to detect and respond metrics

questions.prompt: Does the organization measure alert fidelity, false-positive rates, or analyst queue backlog?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether alert quality metrics are measured
questions.evaluation_focus: Alert fidelity and false-positive rates

questions.prompt: Are AI triage accuracy or analyst efficiency gains from automation measured and reviewed?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether AI triage and analyst efficiency metrics are tracked
questions.evaluation_focus: AI triage accuracy and analyst efficiency metrics

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a unified SOC system that processes all raw logs and provides SOC capabilities?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a unified SOC system processes raw logs
questions.evaluation_focus: Unified SOC system processing raw logs

questions.prompt: Does the SOC apply to the entire enterprise or are there multiple SOC systems?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether SOC deployment is enterprise-wide or fragmented
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide or multiple SOC deployment scope

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy SOAR initiatives as part of SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether SOAR is deployed as part of SOC
questions.evaluation_focus: SOAR initiatives as part of SOC

questions.prompt: Are SOC configurations and log processing reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether SOC configs and log processing are reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: SOC config and log processing review

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system integrate with vulnerability management, patch management, or enforcement points?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the SOC integrates with remediation and enforcement systems
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with vulnerability, patch management, and enforcement points

questions.prompt: Does the SOC identify enterprise security trends and showcase them on dashboards?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether enterprise trends are identified on SOC dashboards
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise trend identification on SOC dashboards

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a clear hierarchy of T1, T2, and T3 analysts to analyze and correlate incidents and capture anomalies?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a T1/T2/T3 analyst hierarchy exists
questions.evaluation_focus: T1, T2, and T3 analyst hierarchy for incident analysis

questions.prompt: Are SOC analysts FTEs of the enterprise or contractors?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether SOC staffing is FTE or contractor based
questions.evaluation_focus: FTE versus contractor staffing model

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented process to escalate incidents?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formal incident escalation process exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented incident escalation process

questions.prompt: Is incident escalation automatically performed by the SOC system where possible?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether incident escalation is automated by the SOC system
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated incident escalation by SOC system

questions.prompt: Is the incident escalation process reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the escalation process is reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular incident escalation process review

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system have capability to perform behavioural analysis?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether behavioural analysis capability exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Behavioural analysis capability

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system perform behavioural analysis automatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether behavioural analysis is automated
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic behavioural analysis

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system have capability to perform software-based scanning?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether software-based scanning capability exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Software-based scanning capability

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system perform software-based scanning automatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether software-based scanning is automated
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic software-based scanning

questions.prompt: Does the SOC monitor logs in real time?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether real-time log monitoring is in place
questions.evaluation_focus: Real-time log monitoring capability

questions.prompt: Are detection and monitoring results reviewed at least quarterly for accuracy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether detection accuracy is reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular detection accuracy review

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system process and correlate identity logs?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether identity logs are correlated
questions.evaluation_focus: Identity log correlation

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system process and correlate device logs?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether device logs are correlated
questions.evaluation_focus: Device log correlation

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system process and correlate network logs?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether network logs are correlated
questions.evaluation_focus: Network log correlation

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system process and correlate threat information?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether threat information is correlated
questions.evaluation_focus: Threat information correlation

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise engage in threat hunting activities to improve SOC capability?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether threat hunting activities are conducted
questions.evaluation_focus: Threat hunting activities

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system process and correlate application logs?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application logs are correlated
questions.evaluation_focus: Application log correlation

questions.prompt: Does the SOC system process and correlate data logs?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether data logs are correlated
questions.evaluation_focus: Data log correlation

questions.prompt: Are compliance visibility logs sent to the SOC system for correlation?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether compliance visibility logs feed the SOC
questions.evaluation_focus: Compliance visibility logs sent to SOC

questions.prompt: Does the SOC monitor artifacts necessary for other management services' KPIs and KRIs?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the SOC monitors KPI/KRI artifacts for other services
questions.evaluation_focus: SOC monitors KPI/KRI artifacts for other management services

questions.prompt: Does the SOC have capability to block access based on compromise threats?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the SOC can block access based on compromise threats
questions.evaluation_focus: Block access based on compromise threats

questions.prompt: Can blocking and unblocking of compromised or remediated resources be performed automatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether threat containment blocking and unblocking is automated
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic blocking and unblocking of compromised or remediated resources

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a threat intelligence platform and management service for threat intelligence?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a threat intelligence platform and service exist
questions.evaluation_focus: Threat intelligence platform and management service

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise ingest threat intelligence and remediation recommendations automatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether threat intelligence ingestion is automated
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic threat intelligence ingestion and remediation recommendations

questions.prompt: Is threat intelligence reviewed at least quarterly for accuracy and relevance?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether threat intelligence is reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular threat intelligence accuracy and relevance review

questions.prompt: Does threat intelligence integrate with the SOC and other segments for contextual information?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether threat intelligence integrates across segments
questions.evaluation_focus: Threat intelligence integration with SOC and other segments

questions.prompt: Does the SOC use AI to assist alert triage and prioritization?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether AI assists alert triage and prioritization
questions.evaluation_focus: AI-assisted alert triage and prioritization

questions.prompt: Does the SOC generate AI-assisted investigation summaries that analysts review before action?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether AI-generated investigation summaries are reviewed by analysts
questions.evaluation_focus: AI-generated investigation summaries with analyst review

questions.prompt: Are policies in place governing approved AI use in SOC workflows, including human oversight requirements?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether AI use in SOC workflows is governed with analyst oversight
questions.evaluation_focus: Governance for AI use in SOC workflows
